12:     state: &StackState,
13:     branch: &str,
14:     repo: &str,
15: ) -> Vec<crate::stack_body::AncestorPr> {

17:     let len = path.len();
18:     if len < 2 {
19:         return vec![];
20:     }
21:

25:         .map(|b| {

28:                 if repo.is_empty() {
29:                     None
30:                 } else {
31:                     Some(format!("https://github.com/{repo}/pull/{n}"))
32:                 }
33:             });
34:             crate::stack_body::AncestorPr {
35:                 branch: b.clone(),
36:                 pr_number,
37:                 pr_url,
38:             }
39:         })
40:         .collect()
41: }
